description_long: This is a dark, futuristic airplane with a robust, armored fuselage and a heavily armed nose featuring a multi-barrel rotary cannon. The wings are short and straight, mounted mid-fuselage, and equipped with small, angular control surfaces. The rear of the airplane has a distinctive twin-engine configuration with large, cylindrical exhausts and a compact tail assembly. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with a tinted canopy, and streamlined into the body for minimal drag. Subtle panel lines, vents, and yellow accent markings add to its high-tech, military appearance. The overall design suggests a heavily armed, agile attack aircraft suitable for urban or close-support operations.
description: A dark, armored, futuristic attack airplane with a rotary cannon nose, twin rear engines, and a forward-enclosed cockpit. Its compact, mid-wing design and angular features give it a high-tech, military look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the prominent rotary cannon, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical mid-mounted wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, cockpit placement, rotary cannon, and twin rear engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin-engine exhausts, compact tail assembly, and wing configuration.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rotary cannon, cockpit, and engine details from the opposite side.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, short wings and angular control surfaces; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage, side-by-side.
attribute_tail_design: Compact tail with twin vertical stabilizers integrated into the engine nacelles; no conventional horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear, partially visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat configuration and a streamlined, tinted canopy.
